sectiondef.header: Renesas RX clock source selection definitions
Renesas RX clock source definitions for some peripherals selections

description.para: Encoded clock source values used by certain peripherals.

sectiondef.header: Renesas RX clock source selection for Low-power-timer (LPT) definitions
Renesas RX Module Stop Control Register (MSTP) definitions

briefdescription.para: Renesas RX Clock Generator Circuit (CGC) definitions for Zephyr.

detaileddescription.para: This header provides macro constants for clock source selections and multipliers/dividers for Renesas RX SoCs. These values are used by the DeviceTree clock control subsystem to describe clock configurations.
